description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring prominent Street Fighter II branding on the marquee and screen. The cabinet is primarily black with striking side panel artwork depicting a muscular fighter in red gloves and headband, likely Ryu from the Street Fighter series. The front control panel is decorated with colorful graphics and is equipped with two sets of controls, each consisting of a joystick and multiple buttons, allowing for two-player gameplay. The screen is set into a recessed bezel above the control panel, and the lower front panel includes a visible coin slot mechanism. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and has a glossy, smooth surface. The overall design is both functional and visually engaging, making it a recognizable fixture in arcades and urban entertainment spaces.
description: A black upright arcade cabinet with Street Fighter II branding, vibrant side art of a fighter, and a colorful two-player control panel. Features a screen, coin slot, and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Left side view showing detailed artwork of a fighter in red gloves and headband, with the control panel and part of the screen visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Street Fighter II marquee, screen, colorful two-player control panel, and coin slot on the lower panel.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same fighter artwork and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel with no visible artwork or features.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a thick black bezel surrounding the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons per player, set on a vibrant, illustrated panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the Street Fighter II logo in bold, colorful letters on a black background, matching the game's theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, detailed artwork of a muscular fighter in red gloves and headband, rendered in grayscale with red accents, covering most of the side panel.
